resources.string: Share an idea to improve the app
Show animations after rating a card
Show animations after rating a card
Review reaction animations appear briefly after Again, Hard, Good, and Easy.
When this is off, your anonymous activity will not appear on the leaderboard.
Connect cloud sync to manage leaderboard participation.
Android system and per-app language settings
This opens Android\'s language setting for Flashcards. To change every app on this device, use Android Settings > System > Languages.
Browse tags used by workspace cards
Retention, learning steps, and interval behavior
Send an idea, bug report, or rough note about what would make Flashcards better.
%1$d enqueued, %2$d running, %3$d blocked, %4$d cancelled, %5$d failed, %6$d succeeded
Start a new linked workspace in the cloud
The current workspace selection is invalid on this device. Retry the last workspace action or reload linked workspaces.
Create an account or log in to upgrade Guest AI before managing workspaces.
Sign in to load linked workspaces.
The linked workspace list did not reconcile to the expected current workspace.
Sign in to manage linked workspaces.
Review and revoke long-lived bot connections
Sync is blocked on this device
Use Log out to clear local cloud identity on this device before reconnecting.
This clears cloud identity from the current device and keeps local card data intact.
Logged out. This device is disconnected.
Use a base HTTPS URL like https://example.com
Enter a valid custom server URL.
Could not reset the official server.
Review and revoke long-lived bot connections tied to this cloud account.
Sign in to the cloud account to manage long-lived bot connections.
No long-lived bot connections were created for this account.
Could not revoke the agent connection.
Permanently delete this account and all cloud data.
Sign in to a linked cloud account before deleting it.
Warning! This action is permanent. Type the phrase below exactly to continue.
Enter the confirmation phrase exactly to continue.
Take photos directly from Android AI flows.
Dictate text into Android AI flows.
Choose images through the Android system photo picker.
Choose documents through the Android system file picker.
Camera access is available. You can turn it off later from Android app settings.
Request camera access when you are ready to take a photo from Android.
Camera access is blocked for this app. Open Android app settings to allow it again.
Camera uses a direct Android permission flow.
This device does not report camera hardware.
Microphone access is available. You can turn it off later from Android app settings.
Request microphone access when you are ready to dictate text from Android.
Microphone access is blocked for this app. Open Android app settings to allow it again.
Microphone uses a direct Android permission flow.
This device does not report microphone hardware.
Android 14+ uses the system photo picker here, so broad storage access is not required.
Android uses the system document picker here, so broad storage access is not required.
Study reminders stay on this device and contain cards only, never marketing.
Android can deliver enabled study reminders.
Allow Android notifications to deliver study reminders.
Android is blocking study reminders. Open app settings to allow notifications again.
If you have not reviewed today, Flashcards reminds you 4, 3, and 2 hours before midnight so you can keep your streak.
Send cards from the current workspace.
Supported launchers may show a red 1 or dot while a review reminder notification is active. Opening the app or completing a review clears delivered review reminders.
Send one card every day at the selected time.
Send a card after you have been away for a while, during the time window you choose.
Reset study progress for every card in this workspace. Card content stays intact.
Sign in to a linked cloud workspace before resetting progress.
reset all progress for all cards in this workspace
Enter the confirmation phrase exactly to continue.
Type the phrase below exactly to load the reset preview for this workspace.
This will reset progress for %1$d cards in this workspace. Card content, tags, and decks stay intact.
No cards in this workspace currently have progress to reset.
Workspace rename is available only for linked cloud workspaces.
Permanently delete this workspace and all cards, decks, reviews, and sync history inside it.
Workspace delete is available only for linked cloud workspaces.
This permanently deletes %1$d active cards. A new empty Personal workspace will be created immediately after deletion.
This permanently deletes %1$d active cards from this workspace.
Warning! This action is permanent. Type the phrase below exactly to continue.
No tags have been used yet.
This count is for the full workspace and does not double-count cards that share tags.
No decks yet. Create the first filtered deck for this workspace.
This workspace does not have any cards yet.
This filtered deck has no matching cards yet.
This deck has no rules, so it includes all cards.
No cards match this deck yet.
Selected effort levels and tags decide which cards match. Select this deck from the Review filter.
No tags available yet. Create cards first, then use their tags in a deck rule.
Choose at least one effort level or tag, or use All cards in Review.
Higher values bring cards back sooner.
Comma-separated step list after Again in review.
Spread long-term review intervals a bit to avoid clustering.
This changes future review intervals only and keeps current card history intact.
Scheduler settings could not be saved.
Desired retention must be a decimal number.
Desired retention must be greater than 0 and less than 1.
Maximum interval must be a positive integer.
Android export could not be prepared.
Android export could not be written.
Sign in with email to upgrade this Guest AI session into a linked cloud account.
Sign in with email to link this Android device to your cloud workspace.
Enter the one-time code sent to %1$s to finish upgrading Guest AI. If you don\'t see it, check your spam folder.
Enter the one-time code sent to %1$s. If you don\'t see it, check your spam folder.
Signed-in setup was cancelled. This device is disconnected.
We could not confirm that the code was sent. Check your connection and try again.
Could not send the sign-in code.
Too many sign-in attempts. Try again later.
We could not verify the code right now. Check your connection and try again.
The guest session on this device could not be restored. Your local data is still here. Sign in with email to save it in a recovered workspace, or erase local data and start fresh.
Secure sign-in credentials are missing on this device. Your local data is still here. Sign in with the original cloud account to reconnect it, or erase local data and start fresh.
Cloud recovery data on this device is invalid. To keep the app safe, normal use is blocked. Erase local data and start fresh, or try signing in if recovery is still possible.
Erase local data and start fresh
This deletes local cards and workspaces on this device. Cloud data is not changed, and no backend request will be made.
Cloud recovery data on this device is invalid. Sign-in could not recover it. Erase local data and start fresh, or try signing in again if recovery is still possible.
Preparing to upgrade Guest AI into %1$s...
Choose a linked workspace to open on this Android device, or create a new one.
Choose the linked workspace that should receive this Guest AI session, or create a new one.
Completing cloud setup for this device.
Preparing your Guest AI session for a linked Android cloud account.
Preparing your cloud workspace on this Android device.
Keep this screen open while Android reconnects preserved local data to your recovered workspace.
Keep this screen open while Android finishes the initial cloud sync.
Local data recovery failed. Try again; local data stays on this device.
Sign in with the original cloud account and workspace to reconnect preserved local data.
Guest credentials are missing on this device. Local data is preserved for recovery in a linked workspace.
Account upgrade recovery is pending. Reopen the app to finish recovery before signing in again.
Cloud recovery data on this device is invalid. Reset cloud identity or sign in again after clearing recovery.
Cloud recovery state was reset. Sign in again to continue.
Read how Flashcards Open Source App handles data.
Read the terms for the hosted service.
Open the support page in your browser.
Browse the public source code and issues.

Free Sunrise Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Sunrise Over Mountains Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Peace Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Plant Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Owl Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Poodle Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Whale Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Peacock Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Ox Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Paw Prints Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Racehorse Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Volcano Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Unicorn Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Snail Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Rose Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Rainbow Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Phoenix Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Worm Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Tornado Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
Free Wilted Flower Animation by Google Inc., Copyright (c) 2026 Google Inc., used under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0. Lottie runtimes use MIT and Apache 2.0 licenses.
Open complete third-party notices and bundled license text.
Open the license terms for the review Lottie animations.
Project direction is open-source first, with self-hosting support planned.
